commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review, exact-head CI/mergeability, and related-report reconciliation after landing.; Cleared: The diff tightens Google Chat thread validation and uses existing Google auth dependencies without adding permissions, new workflows, dependency sources, or secret-handling paths. (sha=b9bae93b1a109a68714fdee567b43cfcc7d63eaf)
commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves Google Chat inbound thread resource names through reply delivery and message-tool sends, validates outbound thread resources, adjusts Google auth transport selection, and adds regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main lacks MessageThreadId, forwards replyToId into Google Chat thread.name, and does not validate thread resource names. The PR body also includes copied live output from a real Google Chat runtime showing after-fix replies stayed in-thread.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review, exact-head CI/mergeability, and related-report reconciliation after landing.
